page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and lacks local storage or integrated GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a 7 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-threaded and multi-threaded capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by lower scores in stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests, alongside poor single-threaded gzip compression. However, the 16 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance across stress-ng, PassMark, and Geekbench multi-threaded suites, including software compilation and ray tracing workloads. Memory bandwidth remains average for both cached and uncached operations, though the overall PassMark memory score is positioned in the lower tier.

From a resource and cost perspective, the instance offers dedicated CPU allocation without hyper-threading overhead, which ensures predictable execution times for multi-threaded tasks. The absence of bundled local storage means storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. This instance is best suited for general-purpose workloads that benefit from multi-core parallelization rather than raw single-threaded speed, such as static web serving, database operations, Redis caching, and light text processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance but average multi-core execution across various compute and memory tests, including software compilation, database operations, and Redis SET transactions. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for workloads that leverage parallel processing without requiring extreme single-threaded speed. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, static web serving, database operations, and multi-threaded utility tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 7 Gbps network baseline, offering balanced multi-core performance for standard workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, delivering reliable multi-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual server featuring dedicated multi-core processing and stable memory bandwidth for standard enterprise workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
7 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage.
Average multi-core performance suitable for parallelized processing tasks.
Well-suited for static web serving, database operations, and Redis caching.
